name_en: This 30 Montaigne Avenue handbag features an elegant design that elevates the style of this classic series. Crafted from black patent calfskin, the rounded flap features a refined curve and is accented with a vintage gold-finish metal CD turnlock, inspired by the stopper of a Christian Dior perfume bottle. The back is embossed with the 30 Montaigne logo and features the classic chain strap alternating between gold-finish metal and enamel links in the same tone as the leather. Pleated design, spacious interior, refined silhouette, can be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody.
name_cn:
This 30 Montaigne Avenue handbag features an elegant design that elevates the style of this classic series. Crafted from black patent calfskin, the rounded flap features a refined curve and is accented with a vintage gold-finish metal CD turnlock, inspired by the stopper of a Christian Dior perfume bottle. The back is embossed with the 30 Montaigne logo and features the classic chain strap alternating between gold-finish metal and enamel links in the same tone as the leather. Pleated design, spacious interior, refined silhouette, can be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody.
Dimensions: 22.5 x 12.5 x 6.5
0322
